description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Blue plastic round case with crystal embellishments on the bezel Blue plastic strap with a butterfly clasp Blue dial with copper hands ed hardy branding on the dial Date aperture on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
